Hey, what's up guys? It's Justin from Gym Launch and I want to do the July lead gen overview. So for July we are launching two new funnels. We have the famous results guarantee hybrid funnel. We also have the 42-day detox swimsuit challenge which could be a hybrid funnel, it could be a six-week challenge funnel, whatever you're looking to do, it can run. Now, a couple things on these funnels. You obviously want to adjust this to back up what you're offering. So if you're offering guarantee, then do that. If you're offering six weeks free, I definitely would not put free in your funnel but you can have six weeks in here. It's all up to you. Anything goes with the 42-day or the famous results guarantee. In this video, I make a lot of promises. If they do not go with what you were offering, you would definitely want to re-film this. I would also suggest re-filming this for yourself anyways because they're going to watch this and watch you see you when you come in. It's not fancy, I did this in my living room. So as far as the ads go, I want to show you first of all some things that worked and some things that didn't. One of the things I do want to show you guys is we do run a lot of different things and we ran it back to school campaign. It failed bad. I want you guys to realize that not everything that we do works out perfect. Now what did work? On the swimsuit slim down, we found that people in real bathing suits and bikinis did amazing and this includes men. So real looking people, not models, not fake, did very, very well. There is one polished video that we made that did well but for the most part, most of our high converting stuff was all provided by gym owners just like you. Assets and headlines. What I would suggest is launching one dynamic ad set for your images and one dynamic ad set for your videos with the copy variations and headlines that you have in there. Just to see where that's at, that might be the first thing you do to see what works well in your area and then you can launch the rest of the ad sets. We had all of the ad sets at a $5 a day budget and that just seemed to bring in leads much, much cheaper. So starting at a $5 a day, we did not scale it all but you will and talk to your coach about that. But $5 a day ad set budget allows you to test a lot of things and it gets you a relatively low lead cost which is what we're trying to do. So guys, hope this is awesome. We have a lot more fun stuff coming out for you in August and we'll see you then.
